fields.name: loan_disbursement_instructions
fields.description: Collection of loan disbursement instructions from the credit system to accounts for fund transfer execution

children.name: instruction_id
children.description: Unique identifier for this disbursement instruction, assigned by the credit system

children.name: loan_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the underlying loan contract in the credit system

children.name: borrower_name
children.description: Legal name of the borrower (individual or entity) as recorded in the credit system

children.name: borrower_account_number
children.description: Account number of the borrower at the bank, used for reconciliation and audit purposes

children.name: disbursement_amount
children.description: Principal amount to be disbursed to the borrower in the specified currency

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the disbursement amount

children.name: disbursement_date
children.description: Scheduled date on which funds are to be transferred to the destination account

children.name: disbursement_method
children.description: Method by which funds will be transferred to the borrower

children.name: destination_account
children.description: Account number at the destination bank where funds are to be credited

children.name: destination_bank_code
children.description: BIC (Bank Identifier Code) of the destination bank for international fund routing

children.name: purpose
children.description: Business purpose or use of funds as stated in the loan agreement

children.name: loan_term_months
children.description: Duration of the loan in months

children.name: interest_rate
children.description: Annual interest rate applicable to the loan, expressed as a percentage

children.name: status
children.description: Current approval and processing status of the disbursement instruction

children.name: created_by
children.description: User identifier of the credit officer who created the disbursement instruction

children.name: created_date
children.description: Date on which the disbursement instruction was created in the credit system

children.name: approved_by
children.description: User identifier of the credit manager who approved the disbursement instruction; null if not yet approved

children.name: approved_date
children.description: Date on which the disbursement instruction was approved; null if not yet approved

children.name: remarks
children.description: Free-text notes or comments regarding the disbursement instruction, such as approval status or special conditions
